notes: with_skill achieves 100% pass rate on both evals vs 17-29% without_skill — a +77% delta
without_skill baselines failed primarily because files were not collected (created outside workspace dir or not at all)
Both baselines correctly inferred layout direction (turn1-proposes assertions pass) but failed to produce verifiable output files
with_skill runs took ~60% longer on average (146s vs 90s) — skill's conversational workflow adds time but ensures quality
Single-run results — variance unknown, need multi-trial (task #36) for statistical confidence
